title: Service Internal Traffic Policy — Using Service Internal Traffic Policy
text:
You can enable the internal-only traffic policy for a
Service
, by setting its
.spec.internalTrafficPolicy
to
Local
. This tells kube-proxy to only use node local
endpoints for cluster internal traffic.
The following example shows what a Service looks like when you set
.spec.internalTrafficPolicy
to
Local
:
apiVersion
:
v1
kind
:
Service
metadata
:
name
:
my-service
spec
:
selector
:
app.kubernetes.io/name
:
MyApp
ports
:
-
protocol
:
TCP
port
:
80
targetPort
:
9376
internalTrafficPolicy
:
Local
